name: easy-invoice
title: Easy Invoice
description: Create and manage professional PDF invoices in seconds. Track clients, export records, and get paid faster.
author: davidosull

commands.name: create-invoice
commands.title: Create Invoice
commands.subtitle: Easy Invoice
commands.description: Create and generate a new PDF invoice

commands.name: export-invoices
commands.title: Export Invoices
commands.subtitle: Easy Invoice
commands.description: Export invoice history as CSV or PDF summary

commands.name: manage-clients
commands.title: Manage Clients
commands.subtitle: Easy Invoice
commands.description: Add, edit, and remove saved clients

preferences.name: businessName
preferences.title: Business Name
preferences.description: Your trading name shown on invoices

preferences.name: yourName
preferences.title: Your Name
preferences.description: Your full name for email correspondence

preferences.name: businessAddress
preferences.title: Business Address
preferences.description: Full address shown on invoices. Use commas to separate lines.

preferences.name: bankName
preferences.title: Bank Name
preferences.description: Bank details are printed on invoices so clients can pay you directly

preferences.name: paymentTermsDays
preferences.title: Payment Terms (Days)
preferences.description: Default number of days until payment is due

preferences.name: paymentTermsText
preferences.title: Payment Terms Text
preferences.description: Optional custom payment terms text. Leave blank to auto-generate from days.

preferences.name: vatRegistered
preferences.title: VAT Registered
preferences.description: Whether VAT is applied by default on new invoices
preferences.label: Apply VAT by default

preferences.name: vatNumber
preferences.title: VAT Number
preferences.description: VAT registration number shown on invoices when VAT is applied

preferences.name: startingInvoiceNumber
preferences.title: Starting Invoice Number
preferences.description: First invoice number to use. Set to continue an existing sequence (e.g., 24 if last invoice was INV-0023)

preferences.name: currencyCode
preferences.title: Currency
preferences.description: ISO 4217 currency code for invoice amounts (e.g., GBP, EUR, USD)

preferences.name: saveLocation
preferences.title: Invoice Save Location
preferences.description: Base directory for invoice files. Year subfolders are created automatically.
